questions.question: Which word does NOT belong with the others?
questions.explanation: Planet, meteor, and asteroid are NATURAL objects. Spaceship is MAN-MADE.

questions.question: Which word does NOT belong with the others?
questions.explanation: Violin, cello, harp = STRINGS. Trumpet = BRASS (breath).

questions.question: Which word does NOT belong with the others?
questions.explanation: Biography, autobiography, memoir = NONFICTION. Novel = FICTION.

questions.question: Which word does NOT belong with the others?
questions.explanation: First three are NATURAL water cycle stages. Irrigation is MAN-MADE.

questions.question: Which would be the best heading for this group?
questions.explanation: All four are TYPES OF ROCK. Specific category fits perfectly.

wrongExplanations.0: Too broad — wood, glass also build.

questions.question: Which would be the best heading for this group?
questions.explanation: All four are FORMS OF GOVERNMENT.

wrongExplanations.2: Wrong category — these are forms, not parties.

questions.question: Which word does NOT belong with the others?
questions.explanation: First three are FIGURES OF SPEECH. Paragraph is a STRUCTURAL UNIT.

questions.question: Which word does NOT belong with the others?
questions.explanation: First three are landforms by RELATIONSHIP TO WATER. Mountain is by ELEVATION.

wrongExplanations.0: Peninsula is mostly surrounded by water.
wrongExplanations.2: Continent is the biggest land between oceans.

questions.question: Which word does NOT belong?
questions.explanation: Oak, pine, maple are TREES. Rose is a FLOWER.

questions.question: Which word does NOT belong?
questions.explanation: Lion, tiger, leopard are CATS. Wolf is a DOG family.

questions.question: Best heading for: gold, silver, copper, iron
questions.explanation: All four are METALS.

wrongExplanations.0: Too broad — wood is also hard.
wrongExplanations.3: Too broad — coal is also mined.

questions.question: Which word does NOT belong?
questions.explanation: First three are MATH OPERATIONS. Calculator is a TOOL.

questions.question: Best heading for: Pacific, Atlantic, Indian, Arctic
questions.explanation: All four are OCEANS specifically.

questions.question: Which word does NOT belong?
questions.explanation: First three are POSITIVE emotions. Angry is NEGATIVE.

questions.question: Best heading for: apple, orange, mango, banana
questions.explanation: All four are FRUITS.

questions.question: Which word does NOT belong?
questions.explanation: Mercury, Mars, Jupiter are PLANETS. Sun is a STAR.

questions.question: Best heading for: hammer, screwdriver, saw, wrench
questions.explanation: All four are HAND TOOLS used by carpenters/builders.

wrongExplanations.2: These belong in a workshop, not kitchen.
wrongExplanations.3: Tools, not materials they build with.

questions.question: Which word does NOT belong?
questions.explanation: First three are 2D SHAPES. Cube is 3D.

questions.question: Best heading for: pen, pencil, marker, crayon
questions.explanation: All four make MARKS/WRITE on paper.

wrongExplanations.0: Too broad — backpack is also school supply.

questions.question: Which word does NOT belong?
questions.explanation: First three are MEALS. Kitchen is a PLACE.

questions.question: Best heading for: shark, salmon, tuna, bass
questions.explanation: All four are FISH specifically.

wrongExplanations.0: Whales are sea creatures but not fish.
wrongExplanations.3: Salmon and bass aren't typically called predators.

questions.question: Which word does NOT belong?
questions.explanation: First three are LANGUAGES. Algebra is a MATH subject.

questions.question: Best heading for: red, green, blue, yellow
questions.explanation: All four are COLORS. (Green isn't a 'primary' color in paint mixing — primary is red/blue/yellow.)

questions.question: Which word does NOT belong?
questions.explanation: First three are DAYS OF WEEK. January is a MONTH.

questions.question: Best heading for: doctor, nurse, surgeon, dentist
questions.explanation: All four work in MEDICINE/HEALTHCARE.

wrongExplanations.3: They work in clinics/hospitals, not just offices.

questions.question: Which word does NOT belong?
questions.explanation: First three are EMOTIONS. Height is a MEASUREMENT.

questions.question: Best heading for: piano, guitar, drums, violin
questions.explanation: All four are MUSICAL INSTRUMENTS.

questions.question: Which word does NOT belong?
questions.explanation: First three are FURNITURE. Glass is a DRINKING container or material.

questions.question: Best heading for: tornado, hurricane, blizzard, drought
questions.explanation: All four are types of SEVERE WEATHER.

questions.question: Which word does NOT belong?
questions.explanation: First three are 2D POLYGONS. Sphere is 3D.

questions.question: Best heading for: USA, Canada, Mexico, Brazil
questions.explanation: All four are COUNTRIES IN NORTH OR SOUTH AMERICA.

questions.question: Which word does NOT belong?
questions.explanation: First three are VEHICLES. Road is what they DRIVE ON.

questions.question: Best heading for: book, magazine, newspaper, encyclopedia
questions.explanation: All four are READING MATERIALS / printed publications.

questions.question: Which word does NOT belong?
questions.explanation: First three are TREES. Lily is a FLOWER.

questions.question: Best heading for: water, milk, juice, soda
questions.explanation: All four are DRINKS / beverages.

questions.question: Which word does NOT belong?
questions.explanation: First three are SCHOOL TOOLS for marking/measuring. Dictionary is a REFERENCE BOOK.

questions.question: Best heading for: shirt, pants, socks, hat
questions.explanation: All four are types of CLOTHING.

wrongExplanations.3: Wrong category — these go ON body parts.

questions.question: Which word does NOT belong?
questions.explanation: First three are FASTENING/CUTTING TOOLS. Paper is the MATERIAL you use them on.

questions.question: Best heading for: snake, lizard, turtle, alligator
questions.explanation: All four are REPTILES.

wrongExplanations.0: Reptiles aren't 'cold' as a defining trait — they're cold-blooded but not literally cold.

questions.question: Which word does NOT belong?
questions.explanation: First three GIVE OFF LIGHT. Dark is the ABSENCE of light.

questions.question: Best heading for: penguin, eagle, sparrow, owl
questions.explanation: All four are BIRDS.

wrongExplanations.3: Bats also have wings — too broad.

questions.question: Which word does NOT belong?
questions.explanation: Atlantic, Pacific, Indian are OCEANS. Mississippi is a RIVER.

questions.question: Best heading for: smile, frown, wave, point
questions.explanation: All four are forms of NONVERBAL COMMUNICATION / body language.

wrongExplanations.0: Smile and frown are face, not hands.
wrongExplanations.3: Speaking is communication too — body language is more specific.

questions.question: Which word does NOT belong?
questions.explanation: Ant, bee, butterfly are INSECTS (6 legs). Spider is an ARACHNID (8 legs).

questions.question: Best heading for: heart, lung, brain, kidney
questions.explanation: All four are INTERNAL ORGANS specifically.

wrongExplanations.0: Too broad — finger is body part.

questions.question: Which word does NOT belong?
questions.explanation: First three are ANCIENT MONUMENTS. Statue is general, not specifically ancient.

questions.question: Best heading for: trapezoid, parallelogram, rectangle, rhombus
questions.explanation: All four are QUADRILATERALS (4-sided shapes) — the specific math name.

wrongExplanations.2: Too broad — circle, triangle are also figures.

questions.question: Which word does NOT belong?
questions.explanation: Acute, obtuse, right are TYPES OF ANGLES. Equal describes equality, not angle type.

questions.question: Best heading for: noun, verb, adjective, adverb
questions.explanation: All four are PARTS OF SPEECH — the technical term.

questions.question: Which word does NOT belong?
questions.explanation: First three are UNITS OF TIME. Calendar is a TOOL for tracking time.

questions.question: Best heading for: morning, afternoon, evening, night
questions.explanation: All four are PARTS OF A DAY — times of day.

wrongExplanations.1: Hours are units, not parts of day.

questions.question: Which word does NOT belong?
questions.explanation: Copper, gold, silver are METALS. Plastic is SYNTHETIC material.

questions.question: Best heading for: spring, summer, fall, winter
questions.explanation: All four are SEASONS.

wrongExplanations.2: Seasons are time periods, not weather types.

questions.question: Which word does NOT belong?
questions.explanation: First three are CARDINAL DIRECTIONS. Middle is a POSITION, not direction.

questions.question: Best heading for: noisy, loud, deafening, booming
questions.explanation: All four DESCRIBE LOUDNESS — synonyms.

wrongExplanations.2: Subjective and not all hurt ears.

questions.question: Which word does NOT belong?
questions.explanation: First three are types of ROCK / stone. Wave is WATER motion.

questions.question: Best heading for: smell, taste, touch, hear
questions.explanation: All four are SENSES (along with sight).

wrongExplanations.0: Senses use body parts but aren't body parts.

questions.question: Which word does NOT belong?
questions.explanation: First three are WEAPONS (or shield is for defense). Hammer is a TOOL.

wrongExplanations.1: Shield is for defense in battle — fits.

questions.question: Best heading for: lake, pond, sea, ocean
questions.explanation: All four are BODIES OF WATER.

questions.question: Which word does NOT belong?
questions.explanation: First three are FLOWERS. Branch is part of a tree.

questions.question: Best heading for: cake, pie, brownie, cookie
questions.explanation: All four are DESSERTS — the specific category.

wrongExplanations.3: You bake bread too — too broad.

questions.question: Which word does NOT belong?
questions.explanation: First, second, fourth are SEVERE storms. Breeze is a GENTLE wind.

questions.question: Best heading for: smile, laugh, giggle, chuckle
questions.explanation: All four are HAPPY EXPRESSIONS / signs of amusement.

wrongExplanations.0: Smile is silent — not a sound.

questions.question: Which word does NOT belong?
questions.explanation: First three are CITRUS FRUITS. Banana is a tropical fruit, not citrus.

questions.question: Best heading for: cube, sphere, cone, pyramid
questions.explanation: All four are 3D SOLIDS — the precise math term.
